text: As I stand in this corridor, peering into the brightly lit, glass-walled exhibit space, I feel a sense of liminality—caught between the sometimes sterile feeling of modern infrastructure and the promise of creative inquiry within. The environment is clean and orderly, yet I sense a quiet anticipation in approaching a space dedicated to research and development. It feels slightly impersonal, yet brimming with potential for discovery—inviting me to reflect on the tension between order and the unknown.
